zh.Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Fawdry於1603年6月12日出生在英國奧可福爾恩斯同時，她的父親Richard Fawdry34歲，母親Jane33歲。她於1625年6月25日與Thomas Faxon在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1662年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年59歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔伊姆 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Fawdry于1603年6月12日出生在英国奧可福爾恩斯同时，她的父亲Richard Fawdry34岁，母亲Jane33岁。她于1625年6月25日与Thomas Faxon在英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1662年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年59岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔伊姆 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Fawdry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a topographical name from an Anglo-Norman French * fourderaie ‘blackthorn thicket’, a suffixed form of fourder ‘blackthorn’, which also appears as fouder.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Fawdry was born on 12 June 1603, in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Richard Fawdry, was 34 and her mother, Jane, was 33. She married Thomas Faxon on 25 June 1625, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1662, in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59, and was buried in Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Fawdry est née le 12 juin 1603, à Enstone, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Fawdry, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Faxon le 25 juin 1625, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1662, à Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Fawdry è nata il il 12 giugno 1603 nel Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Fawdry, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Jane, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Faxon il 25 giugno 1625, nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1662, nel Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Fawdryが1603年6月12日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーンで生まれた時，父Richard Fawdryは34歳，母Janeは33歳であった。1625年6月25日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフでThomas Faxonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1662年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクブレイントレで59歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクブレイントレエルム ストレエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Fawdry(이)가 1603년 6월 12일 영국 스퍼드실르 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fawdry(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1625년 6월 25일 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 Thomas Faxon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 브레이트리 엘름 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Fawdry nasceu em 12 de junho de 1603, em Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Fawdry, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Faxon em 25 de junho de 1625, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1662, em Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Fawdry родилась 12 июня 1603 г. в местности энстоун, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Fawdry было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Faxon 25 июня 1625 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1662 г. в местности бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности элм стрит кеметири, бреинтри, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Fawdry nació el 12 de junio de 1603, en Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Fawdry, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jane, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomas Faxon el 25 de junio de 1625, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1662, en Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
